subject: WM-0184 ready for review
body: Closed the sole review finding by freezing the complete sorted three-declaration Hauling mapping closure reached set, exact count, and trailing-LF SHA-256 babcdabd2dcc0998f84968f4959dcab37fede8d1d411d5ebacd1baf663c7deb3 while retaining receiver and forbidden-reachability checks. Targeted 2/2, focused 171/171, typecheck, and Keystone-approved single-worker quality 1096/1096 pass; production blobs are unchanged.
